positive: A celestial jungle silhouette, featuring stylized constellations interwoven with bioluminescent cosmic flora and geometric lunar phases. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, forming a repeating tile pattern ideal for apparel. Use a deep midnight indigo and rich sapphire palette contrasted sharply with vibrant gold foil accents and stark white negative space. The style should be intricate, detailed vector illustration with a clean, graphic novel aesthetic. Emphasize clean outlines, strong silhouette definition, and ethereal glow effects (bloom). Minimalist yet dense in pattern.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, messy, watermark, text, logo, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, solid color background, photorealism, excessive gradients
